items.title: Fraud detection at checkout
items.description: Models train on historical labeled transactions; generalization is measured by catching fraud on new purchase patterns not present in the training window.

items.title: Clinical risk scoring
items.description: Hospitals validate models on future patient cohorts before deployment — regulatory approval depends on generalization estimates, not training-set AUC alone.

items.title: Search relevance tuning
items.description: Ranking models optimize for click-through on held-out query sessions — live search quality reflects generalization to unseen queries and documents.

items.title: Manufacturing defect vision
items.description: Vision classifiers must generalize to new lighting, angles, and SKU variants on the factory line — not just images in the original training corpus.

items.title: Credit underwriting
items.description: Lenders stress-test models on out-of-time validation sets to estimate generalization to future applicants and economic conditions.

items.title: LLM fine-tuning evaluation
items.description: Instruction-tuned models are benchmarked on held-out prompts and tasks — generalization to novel user requests determines production usefulness.
